title: zexmenia phyllocephala
intro: Zexmenia phyllocephala, also known as Guanacaste daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Zexmenia phyllocephala include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or supplements, and may be used to support overall health and well-being.
